mapper.sql: feedback_id, user_id, session_id, run_id, message_id, rating, reason_code, comment, organization, rd_department, department, trace_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update ai_message_feedbacks set rating = #{rating}, reason_code = #{reasonCode}, comment = #{comment}, trace_id = #{traceId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where feedback_id = #{feedbackId}
